item_tooltip.dissolver_enhanced.crystal_: Something's missing, I just can't frame it...
emc.title: EMC: §6%s
emc.action.not_enough: You do not have enough EMC!
wireless_open.fail: No Dissolver block found in a %d block radius!
advancements.story.place_dissolver.title: Deconstruct Reconstruct
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Learn dirt. The economy may never recover.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.wo: Learn wood and discover that logs do, in fact, have fiscal value.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Learn diamonds. Please remain humble in front of the cobblestone.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ex: Learn an item from outside Minecraft's namespace.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Learn cobblestone. Somehow, this is still an investment.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.st: Learn a stick. Wall Street is watching.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ro: Learn rotten flesh. It has value, but at what cost?
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.eg: Learn an egg. The future is mostly omelet-shaped.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.em: Learn emeralds. The villagers would like a word.
Hold 1,000 EMC. The dirt is starting to respect you.
Hold 1,000,000 EMC. The economy is now mostly decorative.
Hold 1,000,000,000 EMC. Please stop pricing cobblestone futures.
Hold 1,000,000,000,000 EMC. At this point the universe owes you change.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ta: Learn 100 items. Memory is just organized hoarding.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ho: Learn 500 items. There is probably a system here.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ev: Learn 1,000 items. The catalog has become the product.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Learn every dye color. The spreadsheet is now festive.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.dr: Learn the Dragon Egg. The end has been itemized.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.orbi: Create your first EMC Orb. Banking is round now.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.roun: Put an EMC Orb into the Dissolver. The orb has completed its paperwork.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.cond: Create an EMC Orb worth at least 1,000 EMC. Conveniently spherical.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.heav: Create an EMC Orb worth at least 1,000,000 EMC. Please lift with your knees.

command.feedback.update.give: %s EMC has been given. New value: §6
command.feedback.player.not_found: Could not find a player with the name '%s'!
command.feedback.shared_data: Private EMC is not turned on!
